snippets.text: India's transition from the old guard is almost complete. Victory in the final will make it so.
It looks as if the Ahmedabad wicket will be slow. Hence it might make sense to add another spin option. Maybe Kuldeep or even Washington?
Will Sanju be able to continue his rich vein of form against NZ who had his number in the bilateral series? Is it payback time for the kiwis?
NZ openers have flown under the radar but exploded in the semi's. Will they do that again?
Lungi Ngidi bowls the slower one with rare mastery. He will remain a key asset for SA going forward so long as he stays injury free.
SA did not choke! They just lost to a very competitive NZ side
Bethell is a rare find! England's future in safe hands with the many talented youngsters in their T20 side.
Pakistan fining their players for poor performance is in very bad taste. They should do better.
